## NamespacedWireCommitPayload type

Namespaced payload to commit a mutation. Either a function that receives the [module state and getters](./x-components.storemodulestateandgetters.md) and returns the payload for the mutation, or a static action payload.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type NamespacedWireCommitPayload<ModuleName extends XModuleName, MutationName extends MutationNamesFor<ModuleName>> = ExtractMutationPayload<ModuleName, MutationName> | ((wiringData: NamespacedWiringData<ModuleName>) => ExtractMutationPayload<ModuleName, MutationName>);
```
